title: Warhammer Quest - Take a Look - Part 8 - The Warrior Expansions part C
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vyg196YvsgE

Daniel (@dungeondive) returns after a short break to wrap up the official warrior expansions with Part C — the final batch of retail warriors for Warhammer Quest. After this, everything that follows is magazine content, fan creations, and the unofficial ecosystem that kept the game alive for decades after Games Workshop moved on.

This episode completes the official expansion catalogue. Every boxed product, every blister pack, every warrior that Games Workshop released for Warhammer Quest has now been documented in the archive.

----

What's the most complete collection of an out-of-print game you've seen — yours or someone else's?
